task.title: Design and implement the healer class in the tactics game.
task.description: Create the healer class with its core functionality, balancing, and integration within the current game mechanics. Follow the PM QA flow to ensure product management and quality assurance reviews.
task.result_summary: PM completed all subtasks and QA approved the final deliverables.
task.objective: Design and implement the healer class in the tactics game.
task.details: Create the healer class with its core functionality, balancing, and integration within the current game mechanics. Follow the PM QA flow to ensure product management and quality assurance reviews.
task.raw_request: Design and implement the healer class for our tactics game with the PM QA flow.

approvals.reason: Design and implement the healer class in the tactics game.
approvals.decision_note: Studio Lead approved initial PM dispatch.
approvals.exact_task: Design and implement the healer class in the tactics game.
approvals.expected_output: A PM-managed work plan with persisted subtasks, approvals, and validated artifacts.
approvals.why_now: This request requires meaningful downstream delegation.

approvals.reason: Implement the Healer class in Python.
approvals.decision_note: Studio Lead approved Developer dispatch after architecture review.
approvals.exact_task: Write a Python module for Healer suitable for the tactics game domain. Include health, mana, spell power, and casting behavior.
approvals.why_now: The upstream context is ready and the PM is about to dispatch a specialist worker.
approvals.risks_json: ["This is meaningful downstream work.", "The Developer worker will create or modify a project artifact."]
risks: The Developer worker will create or modify a project artifact.

delegations.note: Create the architecture and gameplay design document for Healer.
Implement the Healer class in Python.
Create UI and visual notes for presenting Healer.

artifacts.content:
{
  "summary": "PM decomposed the request into architecture, code, and UI subtasks for Healer.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "title": "Healer Architecture Design",
      "assignee": "Architect",
      "objective": "Create the architecture and gameplay design document for Healer.",
      "details": "Document the Healer unit for the tactics game with explicit sections for overview, attributes, abilities, and acceptance criteria.",
      "expected_artifact_path": "projects/tactics-game/artifacts/healer_design.md",
      "acceptance": {
        "artifact_must_exist": true,
        "required_headings": [
          "Overview",
          "Attributes",
          "Abilities",
          "Acceptance Criteria"
        ],
        "required_keywords": [
          "Healer"
        ],
        "required_strings": [],
        "python_compile": false,
        "required_input_role": null
      },
      "requires_dispatch_approval": false,
      "category": "Technical / Architecture"
    },
    {
      "title": "Healer Python Module",
      "assignee": "Developer",
      "objective": "Implement the Healer class in Python.",
      "details": "Write a Python module for Healer suitable for the tactics game domain. Include health, mana, spell power, and casting behavior.",
      "expected_artifact_path": "projects/tactics-game/artifacts/healer.py",
      "acceptance": {
        "artifact_must_exist": true,
        "required_headings": [],
        "required_keywords": [
          "mana",
          "spell_power"
        ],
        "required_strings": [
          "class Healer",
          "cast_spell",
          "take_damage",
          "heal",
          "is_alive"
        ],
        "python_compile": true,
        "required_input_role": "Architect"
      },
      "requires_dispatch_approval": true,
      "category": "Implementation"
    },
    {
      "title": "Healer UI Notes",
      "assignee": "Design",
      "objective": "Create UI and visual notes for presenting Healer.",
      "details": "Describe how the UI should communicate Healer identity, spellcasting feedback, and player readability.",
      "expected_artifact_path": "projects/tactics-game/artifacts/healer_ui_notes.md",
      "acceptance": {
        "artifact_must_exist": true,
        "required_headings": [
          "UI Concepts",
          "Visual Direction",
          "Player Feedback"
        ],
        "required_keywords": [
          "Healer",
          "spell"
        ],
        "required_strings": [],
        "python_compile": false,
        "required_input_role": null
      },
      "requires_dispatch_approval": false,
      "category": "Design"
    }
  ]
}
